subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Thy call hath reached the hearing of the Wronged One in this station, which hath been named the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قد فاز ندآئک باصغاء المظلوم فیهذا المقام الذی سمی مره باسم الملکوت و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for protection
